problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
